description: Immutable official Bolivia scopes used by RuleSpec-BO: the BOLMOD v2.1 tranche-1 statute chain (Ley 843 Reforma Tributaria in the Decreto Supremo 27947 Anexo 3 texto ordenado carrying the operative IVA/RC-IVA 13 percent alicuotas; Ley 065 de Pensiones behind the SIP contribution schedule; Ley 3791 creating Renta Dignidad) and the CCT creation decrees (DS 28899 Bono Juancito Pinto; DS 0066 Bono Juana Azurduy). First Bolivia cut; SOUTHMOD full-bundle program lane 6.
name: bo-rulespec-2026-07-23
